# pf-core

> A Python foundation for building LLM applications whose prompts and spend you can actually see: every prompt lives in versioned configuration, and every call is recorded — prompt version, model, provider, response, tokens, cost — and replayable, in SQLite, MySQL, or Postgres. Each piece exists elsewhere as a separate product; pf-core integrates them, one schema underneath. The dependency-light base install carries logging, exceptions, config, and a service/repo architecture; opt-in extras add the LLM clients (OpenRouter / Anthropic SDK / Claude Code), output validation and JSON recovery, cost budgets, an eval harness, and a FastAPI + SQLAlchemy app framework. Built to be worked on by AI coding agents: file-size and import-layering conventions are CI-enforced, and every module has a one-file reference doc.

Published to PyPI as `pf-core` (Python 3.11+); pin a compatible release (`pf-core[llm]~=<current minor>`). Docs ship inside the package under `pf_core/docs/`, so an installed copy always matches its version — in a consumer repo, `pf-setup` links them at `docs/pf-core/`. The URLs below render `main`, the development line. Current release and history: see the changelog.

## Start here

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/README.md): overview, install, extras
- [INSTALLATION](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/src/pf_core/docs/INSTALLATION.md): extras matrix, install/release/update flows, verification
- [Module index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/src/pf_core/docs/modules.md): one line per module, grouped by concern
- [Changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history
- [Contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Recipes

- [batch-llm-service](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/src/pf_core/docs/recipes/batch-llm-service.md): cache → budget → tracked call → validate → store, fanned across workers
- [critic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/src/pf_core/docs/recipes/critic.md)
- [job-refs-bridge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/src/pf_core/docs/recipes/job-refs-bridge.md)
- [self-consistency](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phierceweb/pf-core/main/src/pf_core/docs/recipes/self-consistency.md)
